description: Interaction rules template based on Adidas dashboard pattern - sets all interactions to Filter for better drill-down analysis

rules.name: Default Filter Behavior
rules.description: All visuals should filter other visuals, not highlight
rules.rationale: Enables drill-down analysis rather than just highlighting patterns

rules.name: Slicer Filters All
rules.description: All slicers filter all visuals on the page
rules.rationale: Slicers should always filter to enable comparative analysis

rules.name: KPI Cards No Interactions
rules.description: KPI cards should not send interactions to other visuals
rules.rationale: KPI cards are summary displays and don't need to filter other visuals

rules.name: Chart Cross-Filtering
rules.description: Charts should cross-filter other analytical visuals
rules.rationale: Enables comparative analysis across different dimensions

rules.name: Map Filters Charts
rules.description: Geographic selection filters other analytical visuals
rules.rationale: Geographic filtering is key for regional performance analysis

rules.name: Disable Highlight Globally
rules.description: Disable all highlight interactions in favor of filtering
rules.rationale: Highlighting can be confusing; filtering provides clearer analysis

steps: Set all target visuals to 'Filter' icon
For KPI cards, set to 'None' icon
edit_interactions.validation: Test each interaction by clicking visuals to ensure filtering behavior

validation_checks.description: Verify no visuals are set to highlight mode
Verify all slicers are set to filter all target visuals
validation_checks.validation_script: scan slicer configurations for filter settings

validation_checks.description: Verify KPI cards don't send interactions to other visuals
validation_checks.validation_script: scan card visual configurations for interaction settings

common_mistakes.impact: Users get confused by highlighting vs filtering
common_mistakes.solution: Explicitly set all interactions to filter mode

common_mistakes.impact: Unexpected filtering when clicking summary metrics

common_mistakes.solution: Apply consistent interaction rules across all visuals

testing_checklist: Click each chart - should filter others, not highlight
Use slicers - should filter all relevant visuals
Click KPI cards - should not affect other visuals
Test geographic map - should filter charts when regions selected
Verify no yellow highlighting appears on any interactions
Test interaction reset - all filters should clear properly

benefits.analysis_capability: Enables proper drill-down and comparative analysis
benefits.accessibility: Clearer visual feedback for users with visual impairments

from_highlight_to_filter.communication: Explain to users that filtering provides better analysis capabilities than highlighting
